Honor Strike Engraving

Enhancement: 1
Once in a while, deals physical damage equal to 130% / 134% / 138% / 142% / 146% / 150% / 155% of their physical armor to all enemies in a small radius around the unit.

Once in a while, deals physical damage equal to 175% / 180% / 185% / 190% / 195% / 200% / 205% of their physical armor and magic damage equal to 175% / 180% / 185% / 190% / 195% / 200% / 205% of their magic armor to all enemies in a small radius around the unit.
